name: Cacio Pepe Pizza
method: Make the cacio pepe paste by putting mozzarella and pecorino in a blender with a little water and mix until well blended. Add more water if the paste is too thick to spread. Add 2 T cracked black pepper. Set aside.

Preheat oven to 460° F. Line a 12 inch pizza pan with holes, parbake on the bottom rack of oven, remove when bottom is evenly browned. Spread the cacio pepe cream over the top of crust. Place salami slices on top of the cream that is spread over your pizza crust and then add 1 cup mozzarella strips and sprinkle pecorino. Move your oven rack to top and broil (500°F) until brown and bubbly. Makes one 12-inch pizza! Olé
